spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the flex-order-vs-reading-order accessibility bug that v137 fixes.

interactive.rationale: The before/after buttons now apply the reading-flow value across row-reverse, column-reverse, and nested flex lanes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises the accessibility bug fix; the page is it.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes row-reverse, column-reverse, and nested flex containers, with the focus log covering all lanes.

summary: Faithful before/after of the headline accessibility bug, now covering row-reverse, column-reverse, and nested flex cases. Chrome DevTools MCP verified fix mode and focus logging with a clean console.
